mainEntity.name: What structured data schema is best for Phoenix personal injury lawyers in GEO?
mainEntity.text: What structured data schema is best for Phoenix personal injury lawyers in GEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use Attorney, LegalService, and LocalBusiness schema markup with Phoenix-specific details like AZ courts and practice areas. Add Review and FAQPage schema to enhance AI citability and local relevance in Gemini responses.

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix firms should implement JSON-LD schema for attorney profiles, linking to AZ Bar listings and case results. This boosts GEO by 30% in AI overviews. Validate with Google's tool, update quarterly for fresh verdicts, and monitor citations across Perplexity and ChatGPT.
